assertions.title: New user sees onboarding form

steps.observed: Registration form displayed with username, password fields and Create Account button

steps.expected: Redirect to onboarding form with Name input and Begin Journey button
steps.observed: Redirected directly to / (home page) - NO onboarding form shown
Home page with 'Begin meditation session' button visible - onboarding skipped entirely

evidence.consoleErrors: 2x 401 Unauthorized errors (likely profile fetch before home renders)

assertions.issues: Design decision: Registration auto-creates a default profile and immediately redirects to home page, bypassing onboarding entirely. New user goes directly to home page without seeing the onboarding form (Name input + Begin Journey button).

blockers.description: VAL-ONBOARD-001 blocked by design decision - registration auto-creates profile and skips onboarding flow
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - this is intentional design, not a bug

summary: Tested VAL-ONBOARD-001: New user sees onboarding form - BLOCKED. Registration auto-creates a default profile and redirects directly to home page, completely bypassing the onboarding form. This is an intentional design decision, not a regression. No fix required - the assertion itself may need to be marked as 'not applicable' given the design choice.
